entity.summary: Concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange launched by Aperture Finance on Manta Pacific in 2023 as a Uniswap v3-style venue integrated with Aperture's liquidity-management tooling.
entity.notes: Aperture announced a late-September or early-October public beta and on October 3 described ApertureSwap as recently launched while starting its first liquidity-mining program. HEI therefore uses 2023-10-03 as the first exact verified public launch marker.

events.title: ApertureSwap launched on Manta Pacific
events.description: Aperture Finance opened its concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange on Manta Pacific and began its initial liquidity-incentive program.
events.notes: The earlier roadmap targeted late September or early October; October 3 is the first exact first-party operating marker.

evidence.title: Aperture Update: Manta Pacific and UniV3 Tools Public Beta
evidence.notes: First-party roadmap identifies ApertureSwap as a V3.5 DEX on Manta Pacific and schedules public beta for late September or early October.

evidence.title: Everything ApertureSwap Incentives Program
evidence.notes: First-party post calls the DEX recently launched and begins the initial Manta Pacific liquidity-mining program.

evidence.title: ApertureSwap on Manta Pacific L2
evidence.notes: Official documentation describes ApertureSwap as a fully functional concentrated-liquidity DEX on Manta Pacific.

evidence.title: Supported AMMs and Networks
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation preserves the supported deployment context and active product identity.
